description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named check-all-parts that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to run a python-scripts job on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest, and a separate golang-scripts job on ubuntu-latest. The python-scripts job checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.8, displays the Python version, and runs several Python scripts. The golang-scripts job checks out the repository, installs Go 1.15.x and the fzp tool, and validates fzp files.
